examples.title: Immediate Addressing Example
examples.description: An example of Immediate Addressing in pseudocode.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode loads the value 10 into the accumulator and stores it in memory location X.

examples.title: Direct Addressing Example
examples.description: An example of Direct Addressing in pseudocode.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode loads the value stored in memory location X into the accumulator and stores it in memory location Y.

examples.title: Indirect Addressing Example
examples.description: An example of Indirect Addressing in pseudocode.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode loads the value stored in the memory location pointed to by X into the accumulator and stores it in memory location Y.

examples.title: Register Addressing Example
examples.description: An example of Register Addressing in pseudocode.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode loads the value stored in register R1 into the accumulator and stores it in memory location X.

examples.title: Indexed Addressing Example
examples.description: An example of Indexed Addressing in pseudocode.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode loads the value stored in the memory location pointed to by X and offset by the value in register R1 into the accumulator and stores it in memory location Y.
